name: Sure
description: The personal finance app for everyone
compose:
name: slashnode-sure
services:
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/we-promise/sure:0.7.1
    container_name: sure-web
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_started
      redis:
        condition: service_started
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: sure_user
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: sure_password
      POSTGRES_DB: sure_production
      SECRET_KEY_BASE: ${secret.APP_SEED}
      SELF_HOSTED: 'true'
      RAILS_FORCE_SSL: 'false'
      RAILS_ASSUME_SSL: 'false'
      DB_HOST: sure-db
      DB_PORT: '5432'
      REDIS_URL: redis://sure-redis:6379/1
    volumes:
      - web_data-rails:/rails/storage
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:3064:3000
  worker:
    image: ghcr.io/we-promise/sure:0.7.1
    container_name: sure-worker
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command: bundle exec sidekiq
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_started
      redis:
        condition: service_started
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: sure_user
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: sure_password
      POSTGRES_DB: sure_production
      SECRET_KEY_BASE: ${secret.APP_SEED}
      SELF_HOSTED: 'true'
      RAILS_FORCE_SSL: 'false'
      RAILS_ASSUME_SSL: 'false'
      DB_HOST: sure-db
      DB_PORT: '5432'
      REDIS_URL: redis://sure-redis:6379/1
    volumes:
      - worker_data-rails:/rails/storage
  db:
    image: postgres:18.3-alpine
    container_name: sure-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: sure_user
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: sure_password
      POSTGRES_DB: sure_production
      PGDATA: /data/pgdata
    volumes:
      - db_data-postgres:/data
  redis:
    image: redis:8.4.2
    container_name: sure-redis
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - redis_data-redis:/data
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-rails:
    name: slashnode-sure_web_data-rails
  worker_data-rails:
    name: slashnode-sure_worker_data-rails
  db_data-postgres:
    name: slashnode-sure_db_data-postgres
  redis_data-redis:
    name: slashnode-sure_redis_data-redis
